title: Business Strategy
prompt: Business strategy: if Hephaestus becomes popular as open source, what commercial path is plausible without damaging trust?

memory_context.content: Hephaestus is optimization-first and should be useful for code, architecture, research, product, strategy, roadmap, and difficult decisions.
memory_context.summary: Hephaestus is broader than code and centered on decision quality.

strategic_memory_context.content: Open-source trust matters; commercial extensions should not make the core feel captured or bait-and-switched.
strategic_memory_context.summary: Commercial paths must preserve open-source trust.
